title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the Codex vs Claude Code comparison itself is the wrong question to ask and identifies a deeper consideration that both tools share.
